title: Dental Restoration * Native American Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Dental Restoration * Native American Community 2 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Disabilities Issues Older Adults Native American Community Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF SILETZ INDIANS CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF SILETZ INDIANS HEALTH OFFICES HEALTHCARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers primary care, dental, radiology, optometry, mental health, and lab services. Also offers medical care related to domestic violence and sexual assault. 200 Gwee-Shut Road Siletz, OR 97380 Eligibility: Federally recognized tribal members, children of tribal members, and the general public. Dental care for tribal members only. Hours: Monday-Thursday 7:30am-5pm, Friday 10am-5pm (541) 444-1030 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GRAND RONDE HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER DENTAL CARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers general dental care including dental restorations. 9615 Grand Ronde Road Grand Ronde, OR 97347 Eligibility: Members of any federally recognized tribe or spouse of Grand Ronde Tribal member.
